title: Ender Anchor
description: Place respawn anchors in the End dimension, just like in the Nether.
body: The "Ender Anchor" mod brings a much-needed feature to the End dimension by allowing players to set their respawn points using a specialized Ender Anchor, similar to the Respawn Anchor in the Nether. Now, adventurers can explore the perilous landscapes of the End with the safety of knowing they have a respawn point nearby. This mod introduces new crafting recipes and resources to create and power the Ender Anchor, ensuring that players can respawn close to the action rather than back in the Overworld. Perfect for those who spend a lot of time battling Endermen or raiding End Cities, the Ender Anchor mod is a game-changer for anyone looking to conquer the End dimension.
